name: NetApp, Inc.
summary: NetApp, Inc. provides enterprise-class software, systems, and services for data infrastructure management. Founded in 1992 and headquartered in San Jose, California, the company offers unified data storage solutions, hybrid and multi-cloud integration, and data management platforms including the ONTAP operating system and BlueXP control plane. NetApp's products support file, block, and object storage across on-premises, private cloud, and public cloud environments including Amazon AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud, serving customers across hybrid multi-cloud deployments.

products.name: ONTAP
products.description: Foundational data management OS supporting NAS, SAN, object, and container environments across on-premises, hybrid, and public clouds.

products.name: ONTAP One
products.description: All-in-one software license delivering comprehensive data management tools for business continuity.

products.name: BlueXP
products.description: Control plane enabling unified storage operations and data management across on-premises, cloud, and edge environments.

products.name: NetApp Snapshot
products.description: Creates and manages point-in-time file system copies with no performance impact and minimal storage consumption.

products.name: SnapCenter Backup Management
products.description: High-performance backup and recovery software for database and application workloads on ONTAP storage.

products.name: SnapMirror Data Replication
products.description: Replicates data at high speeds across environments including cloud service providers and storage tiers.

products.name: SnapLock Data Compliance
products.description: High-performance disk-based data permanence solution for HDD and SSD deployments ensuring compliance.

products.name: Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP
products.description: Native cloud storage service on AWS providing ONTAP capabilities as a fully managed cloud service.

products.name: Azure NetApp Files
products.description: Native cloud storage service on Microsoft Azure providing enterprise-grade file storage.

products.name: Google Cloud NetApp Volumes
products.description: Native cloud storage service on Google Cloud delivering NetApp storage capabilities.

products.name: NetApp Keystone
products.description: Storage-as-a-service subscription offering providing flexible, consumption-based infrastructure.

products.name: Cloud Volumes ONTAP
products.description: Software-defined storage solution running ONTAP in public cloud environments.

products.name: AFF (All Flash FAS)
products.description: All-flash storage systems optimized for high-performance enterprise workloads.

products.name: ASA (All-Flash SAN Array)
products.description: Block-optimized all-flash storage array for SAN environments disrupting the block storage market.

products.name: FAS (Fabric-Attached Storage)
products.description: Hybrid flash and disk storage systems for unified file and block storage workloads.

products.name: StorageGRID
products.description: Object storage solution for managing large volumes of unstructured data across distributed environments.

products.name: BlueXP Ransomware Protection
products.description: Data protection service providing ransomware detection, prevention, and recovery capabilities.

products.name: BlueXP Disaster Recovery
products.description: Cloud-based disaster recovery service for VMware workloads using SnapMirror replication.

products.name: Cloud Insights
products.description: Infrastructure observability platform monitoring performance and health across hybrid cloud environments.

partnerships.description: Native cloud storage partnership delivering Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP as an embedded cloud service.
Native cloud storage partnership providing Azure NetApp Files as an embedded enterprise storage service.
Native cloud storage partnership delivering Google Cloud NetApp Volumes as an embedded cloud storage service.
Integration partnership supporting VMware workloads including disaster recovery and storage solutions.
Partnership referenced in context of FlexPod converged infrastructure solutions for enterprise customers.
